dashboard.alert.note_gap_over_3days.desc: {count} clients have gone at least 3 days without a resolved note after their latest completed session. Threshold: {threshold}.
dashboard.alert.note_gap_over_7days.desc: {count} clients have gone at least 1 week without a resolved note after their latest completed session. Threshold: {threshold}.
dashboard.alert.no_capacity_remaining.de: All tracked counselor availability has been consumed for the rest of the day. Review the calendar for overrides, openings, or waitlist action.
dashboard.alert.portal_request_backlog.d: {count} portal requests are waiting in the backlog. Threshold: {threshold}.
dashboard.alert.intake_previews_availabl: Intake previews are ready for review
{count} clients have completed intake materials and no held sessions, so a pre-session intake preview is available. Threshold: {threshold}.
